title: Frontline Friday Nights
summary: Weekly youth gathering with live music, talks, and community.
description: Frontline Youth meets every Friday for an evening of live music, inspiring talks, games, and connection. Safe, supervised environment.

title: Holiday Programmes
summary: School holiday activities: sports, arts, life skills, and day trips.
description: Full-day programmes during school holidays. Includes sports tournaments, creative workshops, and excursions. Lunch provided.
schedule_detail: School holidays only (April, July, October, December)
seasonal_notes: Dates announced 2 weeks before each holiday period.

title: Community Cultural Night
summary: Open-mic music, dance, poetry, and cultural performances.
description: Quarterly community celebration showcasing local talent. All ages welcome. Free entry.
schedule_detail: Quarterly (Feb, May, Aug, Nov) — check calendar for next date
